landing.text:
Tuta: Turn ON privacy for free with secure emails, calendars & contacts | Tuta
Tuta Drive is currently in closed beta and will launch publicly in a few months.

Sign up
Turn ON
Privacy
Take back your data with Tuta's encrypted email, calendar and contacts.
Create free account
Secure
at a touch
Tuta Mail
Tuta Calendar
Email to feel good about: private and easy to use.
End-to-end encryption guarantees your privacy
We protect your data to the maximum with quantum-safe encryption.
Intuitive design for a fast workflow
The ease and simplicity of our apps lead to an organized workflow.
Stay connected, wherever you are
Use the free Tuta Mail apps for Android or iPhone on the go, online and offline.
Best value custom domain accounts
Use your custom email address for a professional look.
Keep your events private.
Zero-knowledge calendar that respects your right to privacy
The built-in encryption guarantees that your calendars belong to you alone.
Perfectly integrated into your email app
Use email invites to quickly manage your meetings and appointments.
Never miss an event. No Google Push, not even on Android
Tuta calendar push reminders keep your events private on Android, iPhones and iPads.
Organization is key, whether for personal or business events
Quick access to your personal appointments, business meetings and repeating tasks.
A better
web
Secure
End-to-end encryption
Green
Renewable energy
Ad-free
No distraction
Secure
Tuta automatically encrypts all your data end-to-end with post-quantum cryptography which makes it the safest email provider.
This is the most secure email and calendar software that I've been able to find. they have super fast support that got me out of a big jam. Their paid tiers are well worth the money.
MARC DONI
This is hands down the best free privacy oriented email service out there. They genuinely care about the end users' privacy. The data they collect is next to nothing (if any) and provide a plethora of amazing services.
BRYCEN GUNTER
Secure email and a secure calendar. I didn't need 20GB of space but I wanted to pay to support this company. I also enjoyed the ability to have custom domain integration.
CHRIS L McCLISH
A fantastic app! Privacy is paramount with emails, contacts, and calendar information, which isn't used for advertising. I highly recommend it! The team is available and responsive to any issues, should they arise. Go for it without hesitation!
RAPHAËL CAUHÉPÉ-FRANÇOIS
It's hard to find a service that appeals to both privacy nerds and people who just need to get through their inbox asap, but they've nailed it. My data feels safer and the price is reasonable. I'd love to see them add an encrypted meetings feature in the future. Definitely worth the switch, don't think twice.
ROBERT
Green
We take our responsibility seriously and only use renewable energy to power your emails, calendars, and contacts.
Thanks for being a solid company, I'm very happy to have switched from Proton since Tuta handles several things (green energy, F-Droid app, Linux app) way better.
JEREMIAH
Green, genuinely cares about open source, and great service. Tuta doesn't depend on Google services at all, unlike others (Proton)
JERRY
Uses 100% renewable energy, open source, supports non-profits and schools, respects privacy, ad-free. Also offers nice phone and laptop apps. Just switched to a paid account to support the company though the free version is really good already on its own (I've used it for a year now). Definitely five stars!
TARKAN SCHNEIDER
A good alternative to the big players like Google/Microsoft if you care about privacy and want something more European.
OLAF VAN DE BELT
Thank you for respecting our privacy, at the same time thanks for being a green energy company.
DOGA EROL
Ad-free
We give you the freedom to communicate confidentially, without any tracking or personalized ads.
I formerly used Gmail for many years till I just got sick and tired of all the spam and ads. I've been using Tuta for around a year now, and not once have I received spam nor an intrusive ad. Tuta's free plan comes with plenty of space for the average person, and the app is incredibly easy to use. 100% recommend!
KIERAN LEE
Exactly what I was looking for. Independent of Big Tech. Great email program.
NORBERT
Why do I like it? Because the interface is simple and ad-free.
LAURENT OUTAN
Tuta is the best cost-benefit email service in the market. It has the same main features as most mail providers. The difference is that Tuta cares about your privacy and won't use your data against you, nor try to convince you to click on ads selling stuff you don't need.
FERNANDO SILVA
With the big tech companies scanning and using your email as a way to push advertisements, it's comforting to use something secure and, for lack of a better word, cool. You use email a lot right? You ought also know that free isn't really free, the price is for tech companies to get your info. I love Tuta.
CHRIS L McCLISH
Turn OFF
Surveillance
TechCrunch says:
"Encrypted Gmail alternative"
Create free account
Download
Tuta
Encrypted email always by your side.
Android
Download apk from GitHub
iOS
Linux
Windows
macOS
Browser
Freedom
fighters
Sustainability for a better future
We put ethics before profits which makes Tuta a partner you can trust. We are committed to creating a more environmentally friendly future. By using green energy, by supporting non-profits, freedom of speech and strong privacy laws, Tuta fights for a better web!
Our sustainability journey
Our privacy revolution
Big tech companies like Apple and Google use your personal information for their own profit. Now is the time to break free and take back what belongs to you: Your data. In 2011, long before the Snowden leaks, our founders Arne and Matthias knew of the dangers resulting from unlimited tracking and surveillance. They started working on Tutanota (now Tuta) to enable you to have a safe space, free from judgment and discrimination.
Our story
Join the Tuta Team
Hi, we are the Tuta Team. We build the most secure email, calendar and contacts service so you can take control of your data. Our mission is to bring privacy to the world and to enable everyone to store and manage their data with freedom and zero tracking. For over a decade, we have developed our product and built strong ties with privacy and open source communities. Be part of our mission!
Jobs
Welcome to
post-quantum security
German Privacy
Our zero-knowledge architecture combined with strict GDPR regulations guarantee best privacy.
Tuta and Privacy
End-to-end encryption
Choose the world’s first end-to-end encrypted email service with quantum-resistant cryptography.
Explore Tuta's encryption
Open source
All Tuta clients are fully open source and can be audited by security experts.
Tuta and open source
Ease of use
Enjoy the ease and simplicity of our intuitive apps for Android, iOS, Windows, macOS, and Linux.
Explore Tuta Mail
Focus on security
We focus on protecting your data which goes well beyond encryption. Learn what makes Tuta the safest provider.
Our focus on security
Best value for your domain
Use Tuta Mail with your own custom domain and an unlimited number of alias email addresses.
Check Tuta's prices
Privacy
for your organization
Tuta is trusted by thousands of businesses including large financial institutions and human rights organizations to protect their professional emails and calendars.
Save time and money by storing all your business emails end-to-end encrypted in Germany, protected with strong data protection laws. Benefit from best cost-efficiency, high availability, flexibility, and automatic backup - without compromising on security or digital sovereignty.
Join more than 10,000 businesses who have chosen Tuta to safeguard their data.
Tuta for business
For all your
email needs
Business
Protect your data the easy way.
Medical
End-to-end encrypted & GDPR-compliant.
Personal
Free secure email for everyone.
Activists
Privacy, anonymity, security: all in one place.
Journalists
Protect your emails and your sources.
Forever
free
Privacy is a fundamental right and we are here to protect it.
That's why Tuta Mail will be free, forever.
Create free account

Free
Revolutionary

2FA
Secure your login credentials with two-factor authentication (2FA) via TOTP or U2F on all our clients.
End-to-end encryption
All data in Tuta is encrypted. Tuta has zero access to your mailbox so that only the sender and recipient can read your encrypted emails.
Password-protected emails
All emails between Tuta users are automatically encrypted. You can exchange encrypted emails with anybody in the world via a shared password.
Servers based in Germany
All data is stored on our own servers in ISO 27001 certified data centers based in Germany.
Encrypted address book
All data in your Tuta address book is encrypted, even your contacts' email addresses.
Fully encrypted calendar
All data in your Tuta Calendars are encrypted, even notifications are sent encrypted to your device.
Join our fight for privacy with Revolutionary or Legend!
Focus on security
Best value for your money
Break free from Big Tech
Tuta is the world's most secure email service that let's you create an email account for free or with a paid plan. Tuta makes sure that your data is safe - now and in the future.

Password-protected emails

Full offline support

Shared mailboxes and calendars
Tuta is an ethical email provider committed to fighting big tech dominance. Show support to a team that respects your right to privacy and choose Revolutionary or Legend.
Fully open source clients
100% renewable energy
Fair treatment of employees and users
Tuta is secure, fast and private email
Join over 10 million users and email the smart way: fully encrypted!
This is hands down the best free privacy oriented email service out there. They genuinely care about the end users privacy. The data they collect is next to nothing (if any) and provide a plethora of amazing services.

Thanks for being a solid company, I'm very happy to have switched from proton since Tuta handles several things (green energy, fdroid app, linux app) way better.

It works very well and you are not bombarded with intrusive and harmful advertising. A most excellent replacement for all Microsoft and Google email accounts!
ANONYMOUS
Secure email and a secure calendar. I didn't need 20gb of space but I wanted to pay to support this company. I also enjoyed the ability to have custom domain integration.
CHRIS L McCLISH
Secure and private with encryption , ad free and free, what's not to like.
GRIMEST
Best secure Email provider! Love this provider! I've been a happy customer for a while now. I have even recommended this to relatives. No worrying about privacy infringement or identity/data security. I can rest assured that my emails remain private.
TRISH
Tuta is the best cost-benefit email service in the market. It has the same main features as most mail providers. The difference is that Tuta cares about your privacy and won't use your data against you, nor try to convince you to click on ads selling stuff you don't need.
FERNANDO SILVA
With the big tech companies scanning and using your email as a way to push advertisements, it's comforting to use something secure and, for lack of a better word, cool. You use email a lot right? You out also know that free isn't really free, the price is for tech companies to get your info. I love Tuta.
CHRIS L McCLISH
Uses 100% renewable energies, open source, supports non-profits and schools, respects privacy, ad-free. Also offers nice phone and laptop apps. Just switched to a paid account to support the company though the free version is really good already on its own (I've used it for a year now). Definitely five stars!
TARKAN SCHNEIDER

Guides
How to use Tuta Mail (step-by-step guide)
Setting up your quantum-secure end-to-end encrypted mailbox is easy in Tuta Mail. Discover the Tuta Team’s guide to set up, organize, and start sending quantum-secure emails today.
2026-06-28
Breaking news
US government shuts down Anthropic AI model – another proof why we need European digital sovereignty!
In an unprecedented move, the US government under Donald Trump has shut down Anthropic’s newly released AI models Fable 5 and Mythos 5 due to national security concerns for everyone outside the US. Find out why this is concerning and what this could mean for the future!
2026-06-25
Tuta News
Collaboration and Privacy: With CryptPad you get both!
Today we chat to David Benqué, project lead of CryptPad, a private alternative to Google Docs to learn how the encrypted office suite started, what it offers today and the importance of end-to-end encryption in collaboration.
2026-06-24
Breaking news
Tuta News
Privacy News
Guides
Breaking news
Read our blog to learn why privacy matters. And don't forget to get an encrypted mailbox yourself!
See all Breaking news
US government shuts down Anthropic AI model – another proof why we need European digital sovereignty!
In an unprecedented move, the US government under Donald Trump has shut down Anthropic’s newly released AI models Fable 5 and Mythos 5 due to national security concerns for everyone outside the US. Find out why this is concerning and what this could mean for the future!
2026-06-25
Google's "new era for AI Search" is killing the open web
Google calls its intelligent AI-powered Search box the "biggest upgrade in over 25 years," but we must consider what is happening to the open web (yes, the one that trained the AI). Let's look at why it's bad, and what we can do about it.
2026-06-16
What is U2F used for and what are the benefits?
A U2F security key is important to secure your authentication process. These U2F security keys protect your account from malicious take-over, including pishing attacks. This guide helps you to understand what a U2F security key is and why we at Tuta recommend using one. This helps you to never lose access to your online identity!
2026-03-28
Tuta News
Read our blog to learn why privacy matters. And don't forget to get an encrypted mailbox yourself!
See all Tuta News
Collaboration and Privacy: With CryptPad you get both!
Today we chat to David Benqué, project lead of CryptPad, a private alternative to Google Docs to learn how the encrypted office suite started, what it offers today and the importance of end-to-end encryption in collaboration.
2026-06-24
What started with a team of four, is now more than 40!
The year continues to move forward, and so does the Tuta team as it keeps growing. We are happy to announce that Fedor, Jörg, Mabsuda and Oscar have joined our team!
2026-06-22
From trust to fear: A story on switching to European tech
Rui Craveiro on why geopolitical events shattered his faith in US Big Tech, the importance of digital sovereignty, and why Tuta was the answer.
2026-06-04
Privacy News
Read our blog to learn why privacy matters. And don't forget to get an encrypted mailbox yourself!
See all Privacy News
Age Verification: What countries require you to perform ID checks & for what websites and platforms?
Will the age verification era kill anonymity? More countries are passing age verification laws, now also for social media apps as seen in Australia and upcoming in the UK, France, Spain, Turkey, and Malaysia. So let's take a look at what countries already require it, and for what services, online sites,and social media platforms.
2026-06-10
Discord planned to introduce age verification worldwide – and it's about to go live.
Popular chat platform Discord plans to roll out age checks globally starting in or after June 2026, opting people into teens settings by default.
2026-05-28
Best Private Browsers 2026 | Zero Trackers
When it comes to most secure browsers Firefox and its LibreWolf fork is the best alternative to Chrome on our list - and, no, incognito mode doesn't cut it.
2026-05-21
Guides
The Tuta Guides help you become more private on the web.
See all Guides
How to use Tuta Mail (step-by-step guide)
Setting up your quantum-secure end-to-end encrypted mailbox is easy in Tuta Mail. Discover the Tuta Team’s guide to set up, organize, and start sending quantum-secure emails today.
2026-06-28
Best European PayPal alternatives in 2026
Are  you looking for a PayPal alternative that offers better security and data protection? Learn more about the best European PayPal alternatives for individual and business use in 2026 in this guide!
2026-06-17
Best email for business in 2026 (on iPhone, Android & Desktop)
Choosing the right business email provider is important as email contains a lot of sensitive business data! That’s why we compare four options that many know from work: Tuta Mail, Zoho Mail, Gmail, and Outlook. Our review will help you decide which email service works best for your business on Android, iPhone, and desktop.
2026-06-08

docs.title: Tuta Support | Tuta
docs.text:
Tuta Support | Tuta
Login
Sign up
Products
Download
Pricing
Business
Why Tuta
Security
Privacy Guide
Sustainability
Encryption
Team
Open Source
Community
Email comparison
Discount
Blog
Jobs
Support
Login
Sign up
How can we help you?
Frequently Asked Questions
General questions
Security and Privacy
How to use Tuta
Payment
I can't access my account
If you can't log in to your account you might be in one of these situations:
You have made a typo in your email address or password
:
Please double check your address and make sure that you have typed the full address and the correct domain name (for example youraddress@tutanota.com).
Make sure that the Caps Lock key is not active.
You forgot your password or lost your second authentication factor (2FA)
: Please read
How do I reset my password or second factor?
The code from your authenticator App (TOTP) is incorrect
: These codes are time-dependent. Please make sure that both Tuta and the authenticator App have the correct time and time zone settings. Some browsers or browser extensions block access to the system's time zone.
Your recovery code is not accepted or is wrong
: Please double check whether you are using the recovery key correctly. See
How do I use the recovery code?
Your account might have been deleted due to inactivity
: In this case, you should see a corresponding message below the login form. Free accounts are deleted if you do not log in for a period longer than six months. We do not recycle Tuta addresses which means that the address is blocked for new registrations. You can still re-use the deleted address with a paid account,
but only if you have the correct credentials for the deleted account
. Please see
How do I reactivate an account deleted due to inactivity?
Your account was suddenly suspended due to another reason
: Some accounts are disabled due to a violation of our
Terms of Service
or due to our spam detection. If you think that we have made a mistake, please
contact us in English or German
. Please include the email address of your suspended Tuta account and send us the error message you see below the login form.
Our secure password reset feature allows only you to reset your password. We have no influence on this process. You can read more about this
here
.
I have found a bug
Please try to search for the bug again directly on GitHub before reporting it to us:
https://github.com/tutao/tutanota/issues
I would like to report abuse
Please forward the abusive message with a short explanation in English or German to our
abuse team
.
I have a business request
Please contact our
sales team in English or German
.
Read more articles:

hits.title: Tuta (formerly Tutanota) denies claim it has intelligence ties
Tuta (formerly Tutanota) Mail turns ten today
Tuta/Tutanota Launches Post Quantum Cryptography for Email
Show HN: TutaCrypt, post-quantum encryption protocols for securing emails [pdf]
Tuta Is an Independent Company and Not Linked to Five Eyes Secret Services
Tuta Is an Independent Company and Not Linked to Five Eyes Secret Services

analysis.name: Tuta (Tutanota)
analysis.value_proposition: Take back your data with end-to-end encrypted, quantum-safe email, calendar, and contacts hosted on green energy in Germany.
analysis.ideal_customer: Privacy-conscious individuals and small businesses looking to break free from Big Tech (Google, Microsoft, Apple) with an ethical, European, open-source alternative.

features.name: end-to-end encryption
features.description: All mail, calendar, and contact data encrypted end-to-end automatically.
features.evidence_quote: End-to-end encryption guarantees your privacy

features.name: post-quantum encryption
features.description: Quantum-safe/quantum-resistant cryptography (TutaCrypt) for future-proof security.
features.evidence_quote: quantum-safe encryption

features.name: zero-knowledge architecture
features.description: Tuta has zero access to your mailbox; only sender and recipient can read messages.
features.evidence_quote: Tuta has zero access to your mailbox

features.name: encrypted calendar
features.description: Zero-knowledge calendar with encrypted events and encrypted push reminders.
features.evidence_quote: Zero-knowledge calendar that respects your right to privacy

features.name: encrypted address book
features.description: Contacts including email addresses are encrypted at rest.
features.evidence_quote: All data in your Tuta address book is encrypted, even your contacts' email addresses.

features.name: encrypted search
features.description: Confidential full-mailbox search via encrypted search index.
features.evidence_quote: Search your entire mailbox confidentially via our encrypted search index.

features.name: password-protected emails
features.description: Send end-to-end encrypted emails to non-Tuta users via shared password.
features.evidence_quote: You can exchange encrypted emails with anybody in the world via a shared password.

features.name: custom domains
features.description: Use your own custom email domain addresses (you@yourname.com).
features.evidence_quote: Use your own custom email domain addresses (you@ yourname.com)

features.name: email aliases
features.description: Extra email addresses to reduce spam and sort incoming mail.
features.evidence_quote: Email alias addresses can reduce spam and help speed up sorting of incoming emails.

features.name: catch-all email
features.description: Catch-all address for custom domains.
features.evidence_quote: Catch-all email

features.name: 2fa
features.description: Two-factor authentication via TOTP or U2F security keys.
features.evidence_quote: two-factor authentication (2FA) via TOTP or U2F on all our clients

features.name: u2f support
features.description: Hardware security key (U2F) authentication.
features.evidence_quote: TOTP or U2F on all our clients

features.name: mobile apps
features.description: Native Android and iPhone apps, online and offline.
features.evidence_quote: Use the free Tuta Mail apps for Android or iPhone on the go, online and offline.

features.name: desktop apps
features.description: Desktop clients for Linux, Windows, and macOS.
features.evidence_quote: Linux Windows macOS Browser

features.name: f-droid app
features.description: Android app available via F-Droid (Google-free distribution).
features.evidence_quote: Tuta handles several things (green energy, F-Droid app, Linux app) way better

features.name: offline support
features.description: Use mail app without an internet connection.
features.evidence_quote: Offline support

features.name: push notifications without google
features.description: Push reminders/notifications delivered without Google Push services, even on Android.
features.evidence_quote: No Google Push, not even on Android

features.name: calendar invites
features.description: Send and receive event invitations, optionally encrypted via shared password.
features.evidence_quote: Send and receive calendar invitations. Optionally send the invitations encrypted

features.name: calendar sharing
features.description: Share calendars with others.
features.evidence_quote: Calendar sharing

features.name: unlimited calendars
features.description: Unlimited number of calendars on paid plans.
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited number of calendars

features.name: labels
features.description: Organize emails with labels (3 on free, unlimited on paid).
features.evidence_quote: 3 labels ... Unlimited number of labels

features.name: unlimited folders
features.description: Unlimited folders for email organization on all plans.
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited folders

features.name: inbox rules
features.description: Unlimited inbox rules/filters for automatic sorting.
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited inbox rules

features.name: html signatures
features.description: Customize signatures with pictures, logos, and links.
features.evidence_quote: Customize your signatures with pictures, logos, links, and more.

features.name: autoresponder
features.description: Personalized out-of-office notifications.
features.evidence_quote: Set up personalized out-of-office notifications when you are on holidays.

features.name: schedule send
features.description: Schedule emails to be sent later.
features.evidence_quote: Schedule send

features.name: email import
features.description: Import EML or MBOX files into Tuta via desktop client.
features.evidence_quote: Import EML or MBOX files directly into Tuta as emails.

features.name: contact lists
features.description: Create and share contact groups for easy group emails.
features.evidence_quote: Create and share contact groups to send emails to groups easily.

features.name: shared mailboxes
features.description: Shared mailboxes for teams/family plans.
features.evidence_quote: A shared mailbox (€3 per mth) also gets 20 GB.

features.name: family plan
features.description: Multi-user family option activated via support; each member gets their own mailbox.
features.evidence_quote: Family option ... Each member will get a mailbox

features.name: priority support
features.description: Priority email support with one-business-day response on Legend tier.
features.evidence_quote: Priority email support We reply to support requests via email in one business day.

features.name: attachment support
features.description: 25 MB max attachment size.
features.evidence_quote: 25 MB attachments size

features.name: german data centers
features.description: Servers hosted in ISO 27001 certified data centers in Germany.
features.evidence_quote: All data is stored on our own servers in ISO 27001 certified data centers based in Germany.

features.name: renewable energy hosting
features.description: 100% renewable energy powers all Tuta services.
features.evidence_quote: only use renewable energy to power your emails, calendars, and contacts

features.name: open source clients
features.description: All Tuta clients are fully open source.
features.evidence_quote: Fully open source clients

features.name: ad-free
features.description: No tracking, no ads, no personalized advertising.
features.evidence_quote: without any tracking or personalized ads

features.name: tuta drive
features.description: Encrypted cloud file storage, currently in closed beta.
features.evidence_quote: Tuta Drive is currently in closed beta and will launch publicly in a few months.

features.name: recovery code
features.description: Recovery code to reset password/2FA without provider intervention.
features.evidence_quote: How do I use the recovery code?

features.name: exclusive tuta.com domain
features.description: Access to exclusive @tuta.com address on paid plans.
features.evidence_quote: Exclusive Domain! @tuta.com

features.name: business plans
features.description: Separate business plans available for team use.
features.evidence_quote: See Business plans

features.name: web client
features.description: Browser-based web app.
features.evidence_quote: macOS Browser

differentiators: Zero-knowledge architecture with encrypted calendar and contacts
No Google Push — independent push notifications on Android
Servers in Germany under strict EU privacy laws

recent_ships.what: Step-by-step Tuta Mail setup guide published for quantum-secure mailboxes
recent_ships.source: How to use Tuta Mail (step-by-step guide) — 2026-06-28

recent_ships.what: Tuta Drive encrypted cloud storage in closed beta, public launch upcoming
recent_ships.source: Tuta Drive is currently in closed beta and will launch publicly in a few months.

recent_ships.what: TutaCrypt post-quantum encryption protocols launched for email
recent_ships.source: Tuta/Tutanota Launches Post Quantum Cryptography for Email (HN)

praised: "the most secure email and calendar software that I've been able to find" (Marc Doni, landing)
"the best free privacy oriented email service out there" (Brycen Gunter, landing)
"Tuta doesn't depend on Google services at all, unlike others (Proton)" (Jerry, landing)
F-Droid app, Linux app, green energy handled better than Proton (Jeremiah, landing)
complaints: Would love an encrypted meetings feature (Robert, landing)
Limited storage on free tier (1 GB)
HN threads repeatedly rebutting claims of intelligence-service ties ("denies claim it has intelligence ties", 80↑ 77c)
Free accounts deleted after 6 months of inactivity (docs)

free_tier.limits: 1 GB storage, 1 calendar, 3 labels, no custom domain, no aliases

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1 GB storage, 1 calendar, 3 labels, fully encrypted, no tracking

tiers.name: Revolutionary
tiers.headline_inclusions: 20 GB, unlimited calendars/labels, 15 aliases, 3 custom domains, @tuta.com

tiers.name: Legend
tiers.headline_inclusions: 500 GB, 30 aliases, 10 custom domains, priority support, @tuta.com

pricing.notes: Yearly billing saves ~2 months (€7.20 on Revolutionary, €19.20 on Legend). Family/multi-user must be activated via support ticket. Separate Business plans exist. Prices include taxes. After initial period, plans become non-fixed-term and cancellable any time.

github.description: Tuta is an email service with a strong focus on security and privacy that lets you encrypt emails, contacts and calendar entries on all your devices.
